events.name: Japan Retail Sales (M-o-M)
events.description: Measures the monthly change in Japanese consumer spending, a key indicator of domestic demand and economic health.

events.name: US Dallas Fed Manufacturing Activity (Jun)
events.description: Monthly survey of Texas factory managers tracking business conditions and output, an early gauge of US industrial health.

events.name: UK GDP (Q-o-Q)
events.description: Final quarterly estimate of UK economic output in Q1 2026, confirming whether the economy sustained its expansion.

events.name: China NBS Manufacturing PMI (Jun)
events.description: Official survey of Chinese factory managers; readings above 50 signal expansion in the world's largest manufacturing hub.

events.name: Eurozone CPI Flash (Y-o-Y)
events.description: Eurostat's preliminary estimate of annual eurozone consumer price inflation, directly guiding ECB monetary policy decisions.

events.name: US ADP Employment Change (Jun)
events.description: ADP's private-sector payroll count for June, a widely tracked precursor to the official NFP labour market report.

events.name: US Nonfarm Payrolls (Jun)
events.description: BLS monthly count of US jobs added outside agriculture, released a day early due to the Independence Day holiday.

events.name: US Initial Jobless Claims
events.description: Weekly tally of new unemployment insurance applications, providing a real-time gauge of US labour market conditions.

events.name: UK Services PMI Final (Jun)
events.description: Final S&P Global reading of UK services sector activity; the dominant sector for the British economy and sterling outlook.

events.name: Eurozone Services PMI Final (Jun)
events.description: Final S&P Global estimate of eurozone services business conditions in June, key for ECB policy and growth trajectory.
